Package index

All functions

calculate_CH4_manure()
Calculate CH₄ Emissions from Manure Management (Refactored)
calculate_N2O_direct_manure()
Calculate direct N₂O emissions from manure (Refactored)
calculate_N2O_indirect_leaching()
Calculate indirect N₂O emissions from leaching (Refactored)
calculate_N2O_indirect_volatilization()
Calculate indirect N₂O emissions from volatilization (Refactored)
calculate_NE_pregnancy()
Calculate Net Energy for Pregnancy (NE_pregnancy) (Refactored)
calculate_NE_wool()
Calculate Net Energy for Wool Production (NE_wool) (Refactored)
calculate_NE_work()
Calculate Net Working Energy (NE_work) (Refactored)
calculate_NEa()
Calculate Net Energy for Activity (NEa) (Refactored)
calculate_NEg()
Calculate Net Energy for Growth (NEg) (Refactored)
calculate_NEl()
Calculate Net Energy for Lactation (NEl) (Refactored)
calculate_NEm()
Calculate Net Energy for Maintenance (NEm) Computes NEm based on average weight and CFI coefficients using a relational join approach.
calculate_emissions_enteric()
Calculate methane emissions from enteric fermentation (Refactored)
calculate_ge()
Calculate Gross Energy (GE) (Fixed & Robust)
calculate_land_use()
Calculate land use (Refactored & Fixed)
calculate_population()
Calculate total animal population (Refactored)
calculate_population_cattle()
Calculates the full cattle population structure (Internal Helper)
calculate_population_goat()
Calculates the full goat population structure (Internal Helper)
calculate_population_sheep()
Calculates the full sheep population structure (Internal Helper)
calculate_vs()
Calculate Volatile Solids (VS) for Animals (Refactored)
calculate_weighted_variable()
Calculate Weighted Nutritional Variables (Refactored)
download_templates()
Download Template Files from GitHub
generate_impact_assessment()
Summarize CH₄, N₂O Emissions, and Land Use
load_dataset()
Load dataset from user_data or package default

Developed by Juan Carlos Baez.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
